sourcesContent:
import "../css/AccidentIncidentReport_CSS.css" import "../images/icons/FVSRA_ICON.png" import logo from ".//PDRMA Form 03 Property Loss Report_files/Image_001.jpg" import {useState} from "react"; import {useNavigate} from "react-router-dom"; const AccidentReport = () => { const [AgencyName, setAgencyName] = useState('Fox Valley Special Recreation Association'); const [TodaysDate, setTodaysDate] = useState(''); const [IncidentDate, setIncidentDate] = useState(''); const [IncidentTime, setIncidentTime] = useState(''); const [PersonCompletingFormName, setPersonCompletingFormName] = useState(''); const [PersonCompletingFormTitle, setPersonCompletingFormTitle] = useState(''); const [BusinessPhone, setBusinessPhone] = useState(''); const [BusinessEmail, setBusinessEmail] = useState(''); const [HowIncidentOccurred, setHowIncidentOccurred] = useState(''); const [LocationName, setLocationName] = useState(''); const [DoesLocationHaveAddress, setDoesLocationHaveAddress] = useState(''); const [StreetAddress, setStreetAddress] = useState(''); const [City, setCity] = useState(''); const [State, setState] = useState(''); const [ZipCode, setZipCode] = useState(''); const [Location, setLocation] = useState(''); const [PrimaryLocation, setPrimaryLocation] = useState(''); const [InjuredPerson, setInjuredPerson] = useState(''); const [EmpLName, setEmpLName] = useState(''); const [EmpFName, setEmpFName] = useState(''); const [EmpAddress, setEmpAddress] = useState(''); const [EmpCity, setEmpCity] = useState(''); const [EmpState, setEmpState] = useState(''); const [EmpZip, setEmpZip] = useState(''); const [EmpHomePhone, setEmpHomePhone] = useState(''); const [EmpWorkPhone, setEmpWorkPhone] = useState(''); const [EmpCellPhone, setEmpCellPhone] = useState(''); const [EmpAge, setEmpAge] = useState(''); const [EmpSex, setEmpSex] = useState(''); const [IsInjuredPersonAgencyVolunteer, setIsInjuredPersonAgencyVolunteer] = useState(''); const [InjuryDescription, setInjuryDescription] = useState(''); const [InjuredStatements, setInjuredStatements] = useState(''); const [InjuredSaid, setInjuredSaid] = useState(''); const [FirstAid, setFirstAid] = useState(''); const [PersonAndPositionOfFirstAidGiver, setPersonAndPositionOfFirstAidGiver] = useState(''); const [FirstAidGiven, setFirstAidGiven] = useState(''); const [CprOrAed, setCprOrAed] = useState(''); const [ParamedicsOffered, setParamedicsOffered] = useState(''); const [WerePoliceCalled, setWerePoliceCalled] = useState(""); const [PoliceDepName, setPoliceDepName] = useState(''); const [OfficerName, setOfficerName] = useState(''); const [DidYouExpectAClaim, setDidYouExpectAClaim] = useState(''); const [WasPropDamaged, setWasPropDamaged] = useState(''); const [HowWasPersonInvolved, setHowWasPersonInvolved] = useState(''); const [PropDamageLName, setPropDamageLName] = useState(''); const [PropDamageFName, setPropDamageFName] = useState(''); const [PropDamAddress, setPropDamAddress] = useState(''); const [PropDamCity, setPropDamCity] = useState(''); const [PropDamState, setPropDamState] = useState(''); const [PropDamZip, setPropDamZip] = useState(''); const [PropDamPhone, setPropDamPhone] = useState(""); const [PropDamDescription, setPropDamDescription] = useState(''); const [WitnessLName, setWitnessLName] = useState(''); const [WitnessFName, setWitnessFName] = useState(''); const [WitnessAddress, setWitnessAddress] = useState(''); const [WitnessCity, setWitnessCity] = useState(''); const [WitnessState, setWitnessState] = useState(''); const [WitnessZip, setWitnessZip] = useState(''); const [WitnessPhoneNum, setWitnessPhoneNum] = useState(''); const [WitnessStatement, setWitnessStatement] = useState(''); const [WitnessSaid, setWitnessSaid] = useState(''); const [WitnessLocationDuringIncident, setWitnessLocationDuringIncident] = useState(''); const navigate = useNavigate() //Like going back and forward in "history"/back from the previous or next page const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); let accidentReportObj = { "Agency_Name" : AgencyName, "Todays_Date" : TodaysDate, "Date_of_Incident" : IncidentDate, "Time_of_incident" : IncidentTime, "Name_of_the_person_Completing_the_report" : PersonCompletingFormName, "Title_Of_Person_Completing_the_report" : PersonCompletingFormTitle, "Business_Phone" : BusinessPhone, "Business_Email" : BusinessEmail, "How_did_the_incident_Occur" : HowIncidentOccurred, "Name_of_the_location" : LocationName, "Is_there_an_address_for_incident_Location" : DoesLocationHaveAddress, "Street_Address" : StreetAddress, "City" : City, "State" : State, "Zip_code" : ZipCode, "Location" : Location, "Primary_Location" : PrimaryLocation, "Was_a_person_injured" : InjuredPerson, "Last_name_employee_injury" : EmpLName, "First_name_employee_injury" : EmpFName, "Address_employee_injury" : EmpAddress, "city_employee_injury" : EmpCity, "State_employee_injury" : EmpState, "Zip_code_employee_injury" : EmpZip, "Home_phone_Number" : EmpHomePhone, "Work_phone_number" : EmpWorkPhone, "Cell_phone_number" : EmpCellPhone, "Age" : EmpAge, "Sex" : EmpSex, "Is_injured_person_an_agency_volunteer" : IsInjuredPersonAgencyVolunteer, "Describe_the_injury" : InjuryDescription, "Did_injured_person_make_any_statements" : InjuredStatements, "If_yes_what_did_injured_person_say" : InjuredSaid, "was_first_aid_administered" : FirstAid, "Name_and_position_of_person_who_administered_the_First_aid" : PersonAndPositionOfFirstAidGiver, "What_first_aid_was_given" : FirstAidGiven, "Did_first_aid_involve_AED_and_or_CPR" : CprOrAed, "Were_paramedic_services_offered" : ParamedicsOffered, "Were_Police_Called": WerePoliceCalled, "Name_of_the_police_department" : PoliceDepName, "Name_of_the_officer" : OfficerName, "did_you_expect_this_person_submit_a_claim" : DidYouExpectAClaim, "Was_Property_Damaged_As_A_Result_Of_This_AccidentOrIncident" : WasPropDamaged, "If_Yes_How_Was_The_Person_Involved_In_The_AccidentOrIncident" : HowWasPersonInvolved, "last_name_Property_damage" : PropDamageLName, "first_name_Property_damage" : PropDamageFName, "Address_Property_damage" : PropDamAddress, "city_Property_damage" : PropDamCity, "state_Property_damage" : PropDamState, "zip_code_Property_damage" : PropDamZip, "phone_num_Property_Damage": PropDamPhone, "Describe_the_property_damage" : PropDamDescription, "Last_name_witness_information" : WitnessLName, "first_name_witness_information" : WitnessFName, "Address_witness_information" : WitnessAddress, "City_witness_information" : WitnessCity, "State_witness_information" : WitnessState, "zip_code_witness_information" : WitnessZip, "phone_number_witness_information" : WitnessPhoneNum, "did_Witness_make_any_statements" : WitnessStatement, "If_yes_what_did_witness_say" : WitnessSaid, "Where_was_witness_when_the_accident" : WitnessLocationDuringIncident } fetch('https://api.foxvalleyspecialrec.com/fvsra/accidentIncidentReport', { method: 'POST', headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, body: JSON.stringify(accidentReportObj) }).then(() => { navigate("/submitted") //Redirects page }) } return (

Accident/Incident Report

Attorney/Client Privileged Document

Form

01
1

Agency name

setAgencyName(e.target.value)} id="AgencyName" required/>


Today’s date

setTodaysDate(e.target.value)} id="TodaysDate" defaultValue min="2021-01-01" max="2050-01-01" required/>
2

Date of incident (mm/dd/yyyy)

setIncidentDate(e.target.value)} id="IncidentDate" defaultValue min="2021-01-01" max="2050-01-01" required />


Time of incident (hh/mm, a.m./p.m.)

setIncidentTime(e.target.value)} id="IncidentTime" required />
3

Name of person completing the report

setPersonCompletingFormName(e.target.value)} id="Name_of_person_completing_the_report" name="Name_of_person_completing_the_report" />


Title of person completing report

setPersonCompletingFormTitle(e.target.value)} id="PersonCompletingFormName" required />
4

Business phone

setBusinessPhone(e.target.value)} id="BusinessPhone" required />


Business email

setBusinessEmail(e.target.value)} required />
5

How did the incident occur? (Provide a brief, factual description; do not speculate on fault, etc.)



setHowIncidentOccurred(e.target.value)} id="HowIncidentOccurred" required/>



{/*
*/}



{/*
*/}
6

Name of the location (park, pool, community center; Ex. Smith Pool, Johnson Community Center) or nearest intersection

where the incident occurred.

setLocationName(e.target.value)} id="LocationName" required/>
7

Is there an address for incident location? If yes, please provide the following:
Yes
setDoesLocationHaveAddress("Yes")} id="DoesLocationHaveAddress" required />
{/*

Yes

*/}
No
setDoesLocationHaveAddress("No")} id="DoesLocationHaveAddress" required />
Unknown
setDoesLocationHaveAddress("Unknown")} id="DoesLocationHaveAddress" required />


Street address

setStreetAddress(e.target.value)} id="StreetAddress" />


City

setCity(e.target.value)} id="City"/>

State

setState(e.target.value)} id="State" />

Zip code

setZipCode(e.target.value)} id="ZipCode" />



8

Location (Specify the exact type of location/facility where injury occurred. Ex. maintenance garage, sports field, aquatic outdoor, golf course, etc.)



setLocation(e.target.value)} id="Location" required />



{/*
*/}
9

Primary location (Specify exact location. Ex. lap pool, cart storage, classroom, pavilion)

setPrimaryLocation(e.target.value)} id="PrimaryLocation" required />
BODILY INJURY
If an employee was injured, please submit the form for an Employee Injury (Form 04) type of incident.
10

Was a person injured? (Ex. patron, citizen, participant, volunteer)
Yes
setInjuredPerson("Yes")} id="InjuredPerson" required />
{/*

Yes

*/}
No
setInjuredPerson("No")} id="InjuredPerson" required />
Unknown
setInjuredPerson("Unknown")} id="InjuredPerson" required />
11

If yes, provide the following information:


Last name

setEmpLName(e.target.value)} id="EmpLName" />

First name

setEmpFName(e.target.value)} id="EmpFName" />


Address

setEmpAddress(e.target.value)} id="EmpAddress" />


City

setEmpCity(e.target.value)} id="EmpCity" />

State

setEmpState(e.target.value)} id="EmpState" />

Zip code

setEmpZip(e.target.value)} id="EmpZip" placeholder="00000" pattern="[0-9]{5}" />


Home phone #

setEmpHomePhone(e.target.value)} id="EmpHomePhone" />

Work phone #

setEmpWorkPhone(e.target.value)} id="EmpWorkPhone" />

Cell phone #

setEmpCellPhone(e.target.value)} id="EmpCellPhone" />


Age

setEmpAge(e.target.value)} id="EmpAge" />

Sex
Male
setEmpSex("M")} id="EmpSex" />
Female
setEmpSex("F")} id="EmpSex" />
12

Is the injured person an agency volunteer?

Yes
setIsInjuredPersonAgencyVolunteer("Yes")} id="IsInjuredPersonAgencyVolunteer" />

No
setIsInjuredPersonAgencyVolunteer("No")} id="IsInjuredPersonAgencyVolunteer" />
Unknown
setIsInjuredPersonAgencyVolunteer("Unknown")} id="IsInjuredPersonAgencyVolunteer" />
13

Describe the injury (affected body part and type of injury; Ex. contusion, bruise, laceration, sprain, break, etc.)

setInjuryDescription(e.target.value)} id="InjuryDescription" />
14

Did injured person make any statements?

Yes
setInjuredStatements("Yes")} id="InjuredStatements" />

No
setInjuredStatements("No")} id="InjuredStatements" />
Unknown
setInjuredStatements("Unknown")} id="InjuredStatements" />

If yes, what did injured person say?

setInjuredSaid(e.target.value)} id="InjuredSaid" />
{/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/} {/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/} {/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/} {/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/} {/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/} {/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/} {/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/} {/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/} {/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/} {/*BREAK BETWEEN PAGES*/}

Accident/Incident Report

Attorney/Client Privileged Document

Form

01

(pg. 2)
{/**/} {/* setWitness(e.target.value)} id="Witness" required />*/} {/*Code does not include the yes and no options to say if there was a witness, here is the code if added*/}
15

Was first aid administered?

Yes
setFirstAid("Yes")} id="FirstAid" />

No
setFirstAid("No")} id="FirstAid" />
Unknown
setFirstAid("Unknown")} id="FirstAid" />


Name and position of person who administered first aid

setPersonAndPositionOfFirstAidGiver(e.target.value)} id="PersonAndPositionOfFirstAidGiver" />


What first aid was given?

setFirstAidGiven(e.target.value)} id="FirstAidGiven" />

Did first aid involve AED and/or CPR?

Yes
setCprOrAed("Yes")} id="CprOrAed" />

No
setCprOrAed("No")} id="CprOrAed" />
Unknown
setCprOrAed("Unknown")} id="CprOrAed" />


If yes, please submit a PDRMA post-AED form.


Were paramedic services offered?


Called and refused (at scene by patron) setParamedicsOffered("CalledAndRefused")} id="ParamedicsOffered" />
Offered and called setParamedicsOffered("OfferedAndCalled")} id="ParamedicsOffered" />


Offered and refused setParamedicsOffered("OfferedAndRefused")} id="ParamedicsOffered" />
Offered, refused, called by agency anyway setParamedicsOffered("OfferedAndRefusedButCalledByAgency")} id="ParamedicsOffered" />


Unable to respond and called setParamedicsOffered("UnableToRespond")} id="ParamedicsOffered" />

Were police called?
Yes
setWerePoliceCalled("Yes")} name="PoliceWereCalled" />
No
setWerePoliceCalled("No")} name="PoliceWereCalled" />
If yes, provide the following information:


Name of police department

setPoliceDepName(e.target.value)} id="PoliceDepName" />


Name of officer

setOfficerName(e.target.value)} id="OfficerName" />

Do you expect this person to submit a claim?
Yes
setDidYouExpectAClaim("Yes")} id="DidYouExpectAClaim" />
No
setDidYouExpectAClaim("No")} id="DidYouExpectAClaim" />
Unknown
setDidYouExpectAClaim("Unknown")} id="DidYouExpectAClaim" />
PROPERTY DAMAGE
16

Was property damaged as a result of this accident/incident?
Yes
setWasPropDamaged("Yes")} id="WasPropDamaged" required />
{/*

Yes

*/}
No
setWasPropDamaged("No")} id="WasPropDamaged" required />
Unknown
setWasPropDamaged("Unknown")} id="WasPropDamaged" required />
17

If yes, how was the person involved in the accident/incident?


Owner of property adjacent to park district setHowWasPersonInvolved("OwnerOfPropertyAdjacentToParkDistrict")} id="HowWasPersonInvolved" />
Patron setHowWasPersonInvolved("Patron")} id="HowWasPersonInvolved" />


Vehicle Owner setHowWasPersonInvolved("VehicleOwner")} id="HowWasPersonInvolved" />
Other setHowWasPersonInvolved("Other")} id="HowWasPersonInvolved" />
18

18
Last name (or business name)
setPropDamageLName(e.target.value)} id="PropDamageLName" />
First name (not necessary if business name)
setPropDamageFName(e.target.value)} id="PropDamageFName" />


Address

setPropDamAddress(e.target.value)} id="PropDamAddress" />


City
setPropDamCity(e.target.value)} id="PropDamCity" />
State
setPropDamState(e.target.value)} id="PropDamState" />
Zip Code
setPropDamZip(e.target.value)} id="PropDamZip" />
Phone number
setPropDamPhone(e.target.value)} id="PropDamPhone" />


Describe the property damage

setPropDamDescription(e.target.value)} />
WITNESS INFORMATION
19

If there was a witness(es) to the accident/incident, please provide the following information:


Last name
setWitnessLName(e.target.value)} id="WitnessLName" />
First name
setWitnessFName(e.target.value)} id="WitnessFName" />


Address

setWitnessAddress(e.target.value)} id="WitnessAddress" />


City
setWitnessCity(e.target.value)} id="WitnessCity" />
State
setWitnessState(e.target.value)} id="WitnessState" />
Zip Code
setWitnessZip(e.target.value)} id="WitnessZip" />
Phone number
setWitnessPhoneNum(e.target.value)} id="WitnessPhoneNum" />
20

Did witness make any statements?

Yes
setWitnessStatement("Yes")} id="WitnessStatement" />

No
setWitnessStatement("No")} id="WitnessStatement" />
Unknown
setWitnessStatement("Unknown")} id="WitnessStatement" />

If yes, what did witness say?

setWitnessSaid(e.target.value)} id="WitnessSaid" />
21

Where was witness when the accident/incident occurred?

setWitnessLocationDuringIncident(e.target.value)} id="WitnessLocationDuringIncident" />
); } export default AccidentReport;
